subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Oneness magnifieth thy countenance, O Khamdiyyih! We beseech God that He may guide thee unto righteousness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یکبر لسان الاحدیة علی وجهک یا خمدیه نسئل الله بان یوفقک علی السداد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @exhortations and counsels, @nearness and remoteness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
